headline: SmokyValleyWheatWarriors: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: SmokyValleyWheatWarriors carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 82.80, led by CeeDee Lamb, Christian McCaffrey, and James Cook. The clearest lineup pressure point is the FLEX slot held by Rico Dowdle at 63.3 C-AVI.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are CeeDee Lamb (97.8), Christian McCaffrey (97.2), and James Cook (94.3).

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Rico Dowdle is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 63.3. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 14 offensive players, with 6 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 73.38.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 14 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
